title: Managed Templates: Push dashboard updates (widgets, layout, filters) to existing connected instances

posts.author: CandyJE (Candy Johnson-Eich)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Enable publishing of dashboard changes (widgets, layout, settings) from a Managed Template to all existing connected instances — exactly like board structure, columns, and automations already work today.
This would include:

Adding, removing, or reordering widgets
Changing widget settings (filters, chart types, displayed columns, etc.)
Layout changes (widget size and position)

With the same publish preview and conflict-resolution flow that already exists for boards.

What are you trying to achieve

We are on Enterprise and use Managed Templates to keep dozens-to-hundreds of project/workspace instances in sync. Board-level publishing works perfectly — thank you!
However, no dashboard changes propagate when we publish updates. Every tweak forces painful manual work across all instances:

  • Copy-paste widgets one-by-one
  • Delete & recreate the dashboard (losing shares, private widgets, comments, views)
  • Re-create the entire instance

This defeats the core value of Managed Templates for teams that treat dashboards as their central “status cockpit.” Please extend publishing to include dashboards — it’s currently the biggest friction point for scaled Enterprise adoption.
Thank you! (Upvote if you’ve ever had to update 50 identical dashboards by hand )
